description_long: This sculpture depicts a stout, bearded man standing confidently with his hands on his hips, dressed in a hat, vest, and boots. The figure stands atop a rounded, textured base that resembles stone. The man's facial features are exaggerated, with a prominent nose, bushy mustache, and expressive eyebrows. His attire includes a jacket with visible lapels, a shirt, and pants tucked into boots, giving him a rugged, old-fashioned appearance. The entire sculpture has a uniform, greenish patina, suggesting it is cast from metal or stone. The surface is rough and matte, with visible texture throughout the figure and base.
description: A rugged, bearded man in old-fashioned attire stands hands-on-hips atop a textured, greenish stone-like base. The sculpture features exaggerated facial features and a rough, matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's expressive face, hands on hips, and detailed clothing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, hat, and the depth of the figure's stance.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the hat, vest, and boots, with hands resting on hips.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the figure's profile, arm, and the curvature of the base.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is isolated and white.
